languages.text: {n}Куравич щерится, обнажая острые зубы.{/n} "Ничего хорошего. Мы думали, лучше наших разведчиков никто не прячется, а железяки эти как на голову свалились. Ох и крепкие же твари! Проще десять Погонщиц убить, чем одного такого выродка! Еще они мясом нашим обматываются. Я всякого навидался, но это..." {n}Губернатора передергивает.{/n} "Что еще? Лезвия у них на лапах хорошие, нечего сказать, режут на славу..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Куравич щерится, обнажая острые зубы. {/n}"Ничего хорошего. Мы думали, лучше наших разведчиков никто не прячется, а железяки эти как на голову свалились. Ох и крепкие же твари! Проще десять Погонщиц убить, чем одного такого выродка! Еще они мясом нашим обматываются. Я всякого навидался, но это..." {n}Губернатора передергивает.{/n} "Что еще? Лезвия у них на лапах хорошие, нечего сказать, режут на славу..."

languages.text: {n}Kuravich grins, baring his sharp teeth.{/n} "Nothing good. We thought no one could hide better than our scouts, but these tin cans came out of nowhere. Tough bastards they are! You'd sooner kill ten Drovers than one of those beasts! They even drape themselves in our flesh. I've seen a lot, but that was something else..." {n}The governor shudders.{/n} "What else? Those blades on their limbs are not bad at cutting, I'll give them that..."
languages.original_text: {n}Куравич щерится, обнажая острые зубы.{/n} "Ничего хорошего. Мы думали, лучше наших разведчиков никто не прячется, а железяки эти как на голову свалились. Ох и крепкие же твари! Проще десять Погонщиц убить, чем одного такого выродка! Еще они мясом нашим обматываются. Я всякого навидался, но это..." {n}Губернатора передергивает.{/n} "Что еще? Лезвия у них на лапах хорошие, нечего сказать, режут на славу..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich grins, baring his sharp teeth.{/n} "Nothing good. We thought no one could hide better than our scouts, but these tin cans came out of nowhere. Tough bastards they are! You'd sooner kill ten Drovers than one of those beasts! They even drape themselves in our meat. I've seen plenty, but this is something else..." {n}The governor shudders.{/n} "What else? Those blades on their limbs are not bad at cutting things, I'll give them that..."

You'd sooner kill ten Drovers than one of those beasts! They even drape themselves in our flesh. I've seen a lot, but that was something else..." {n}The governor shudders.{/n} "What else? Those blades on their limbs are not bad at cutting, I'll give them that..."

languages.text: {n}库拉维奇咧嘴一笑，露出他那一口尖牙。{/n}“没什么好消息。我们原以为没人能比我们的侦察兵更会藏，可那些铁罐头简直就像凭空冒出来的一样。一群硬骨头杂种！您杀得了十个拒生花，都不一定杀得死一头那种畜生！它们甚至还会披上我们的血肉。我见过不少怪物，但这玩意儿真是够瘆人的……”{n}总督打了个哆嗦。{/n}“还有什么来着？它们那胳膊腿上的刀刃，砍东西倒是挺好使的，这点我得承认……”
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich grins, baring his sharp teeth.{/n} "Nothing good. We thought no one could hide better than our scouts, but these tin cans came out of nowhere. Tough bastards they are! You'd sooner kill ten Drovers than one of those beasts! They even drape themselves in our flesh. I've seen a lot, but that was something else..." {n}The governor shudders.{/n} "What else? Those blades on their limbs are not bad at cutting, I'll give them that..."

traits.locale_text: {n}库拉维奇咧嘴一笑，露出他那一口尖牙。{/n}“没什么好消息。我们原以为没人能比我们的侦察兵更会藏，可那些铁罐头简直就像凭空冒出来的一样。一群硬骨头杂种！您杀得了十个拒生花，都不一定杀得死一头那种畜生！它们甚至还会披上我们的血肉。我见过不少怪物，但这玩意儿真是够瘆人的……”{n}总督打了个哆嗦。{/n}“还有什么来着？它们那胳膊腿上的刀刃，砍东西倒是挺好使的，这点我得承认……”

languages.text: {n}Kuravich, keskin dişlerini göstererek sırıtıyor.{/n} "Feci şeyler. Kimsenin izcilerimizden daha iyi saklanamayacağını sanırdık, bu tenekelerse bir anda ortaya çıktı. Zorlu yaratıklar! Onlardan birini öldürmektense on tane Çoban'ı öldürmeyi yeğlerim! Hatta bizim etimizi kendi üzerlerine geçiriyorlar. Çok şey gördüm ama bu bambaşka..." {n}Vali titriyor.{/n} "Başka ne var... Uzuvlarındaki o bıçaklar kesmekte hiç fena değil."
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich grins, baring his sharp teeth.{/n} "Nothing good. We thought no one could hide better than our scouts, but these tin cans came out of nowhere. Tough bastards they are! You'd sooner kill ten Drovers than one of those beasts! They even drape themselves in our flesh. I've seen a lot, but that was something else..." {n}The governor shudders.{/n} "What else? Those blades on their limbs are not bad at cutting, I'll give them that..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich, keskin dişlerini göstererek sırıtıyor.{/n} "Feci şeyler. Kimsenin izcilerimizden daha iyi saklanamayacağını sanırdık, bu tenekelerse bir anda ortaya çıktı. Zorlu yaratıklar! Onlardan birini öldürmektense on tane Çoban'ı öldürmeyi yeğlerim! Hatta bizim etimizi kendi üzerlerine geçiriyorlar. Çok şey gördüm ama bu bambaşka..." {n}Vali titriyor.{/n} "Başka ne var... Uzuvlarındaki o bıçaklar kesmekte hiç fena değil."

languages.text: {n}Kuravich fait un grand sourire qui découvre ses dents affûtées.{/n} « Rien de bon. On pensait que personne ne savait se cacher mieux que nos éclaireurs, mais ces boîtes de conserve sont sorties de nulle part. Et elles sont sacrément coriaces ! On aurait plus vite fait de tuer dix Chasseurs qu'une de ces bêtes ! Il leur arrive même de se vêtir de notre chair. J'ai vu un tas de trucs dans ma vie, mais ça, je n'en reviens toujours pas... {n}dit-il en frissonnant.{/n} À part ça, il faut reconnaître que ces lames sur leurs membres sont assez efficaces pour couper... »
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich grins, baring his sharp teeth.{/n} "Nothing good. We thought no one could hide better than our scouts, but these tin cans came out of nowhere. Tough bastards they are! You'd sooner kill ten Drovers than one of those beasts! They even drape themselves in our flesh. I've seen a lot, but that was something else..." {n}The governor shudders.{/n} "What else? Those blades on their limbs are not bad at cutting, I'll give them that..."

On pensait que personne ne savait se cacher mieux que nos éclaireurs, mais ces boîtes de conserve sont sorties de nulle part. Et elles sont sacrément coriaces ! On aurait plus vite fait de tuer dix Chasseurs qu'une de ces bêtes ! Il leur arrive même de se vêtir de notre chair. J'ai vu un tas de trucs dans ma vie, mais ça, je n'en reviens toujours pas... {n}dit-il en frissonnant.{/n} À part ça, il faut reconnaître que ces lames sur leurs membres sont assez efficaces pour couper... »

languages.text: {n}Kuravich sonríe, enseñando sus afilados dientes.{/n} «Nada bueno. Creíamos que nadie se escondía mejor que nuestros exploradores, pero estos armatostes aparecen de la nada. ¡Y son duros de pelar! ¡Sería más fácil matar diez veces al Pastor que a uno solo de estos seres! Hasta se visten con nuestra piel. He visto muchas cosas, pero nada como esto...». {n}El gobernador se estremece.{/n} «¿Qué más puedo decirle? Bueno, sí, las cuchillas de sus extremidades cortan muy bien, debo reconocérselo...».
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich grins, baring his sharp teeth.{/n} "Nothing good. We thought no one could hide better than our scouts, but these tin cans came out of nowhere. Tough bastards they are! You'd sooner kill ten Drovers than one of those beasts! They even drape themselves in our flesh. I've seen a lot, but that was something else..." {n}The governor shudders.{/n} "What else? Those blades on their limbs are not bad at cutting, I'll give them that..."

Creíamos que nadie se escondía mejor que nuestros exploradores, pero estos armatostes aparecen de la nada. ¡Y son duros de pelar! ¡Sería más fácil matar diez veces al Pastor que a uno solo de estos seres! Hasta se visten con nuestra piel. He visto muchas cosas, pero nada como esto...». {n}El gobernador se estremece.{/n} «¿Qué más puedo decirle? Bueno, sí, las cuchillas de sus extremidades cortan muy bien, debo reconocérselo...».

languages.text: {n}Kuravich grinst und entblößt seine scharfen Zähne.{/n} "Nichts Gutes. Wir dachten, niemand kann sich besser verstecken als unsere Späher, aber diese Blechdosen kamen aus dem Nichts. Das sind üble Bastarde. Eher tötet man zehn Treiber als eines dieser Biester. Sie hüllen sich sogar in unser Fleisch. Ich habe ja schon viel gesehen, aber das war etwas anderes ..." {n}Der Gouverneur erschaudert.{/n} "Was noch? Die Klingen an ihren Gliedmaßen sind wirklich scharf, das muss ich ihnen lassen ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich grins, baring his sharp teeth.{/n} "Nothing good. We thought no one could hide better than our scouts, but these tin cans came out of nowhere. Tough bastards they are! You'd sooner kill ten Drovers than one of those beasts! They even drape themselves in our flesh. I've seen a lot, but that was something else..." {n}The governor shudders.{/n} "What else? Those blades on their limbs are not bad at cutting, I'll give them that..."

Wir dachten, niemand kann sich besser verstecken als unsere Späher, aber diese Blechdosen kamen aus dem Nichts. Das sind üble Bastarde. Eher tötet man zehn Treiber als eines dieser Biester. Sie hüllen sich sogar in unser Fleisch. Ich habe ja schon viel gesehen, aber das war etwas anderes ..." {n}Der Gouverneur erschaudert.{/n} "Was noch? Die Klingen an ihren Gliedmaßen sind wirklich scharf, das muss ich ihnen lassen ..."

languages.text: {n}クラビッチは鋭い歯をむき出しにして笑う。{/n}「いいことなど何もない。我らの斥候ほど隠れる者はいないとばかり思っていたが、この缶詰のような奴らがどこからともなく現れた。頑固な奴らだ！我らの十倍のドルーバーを殺した方がマシだ。我らの肉で覆っている。見たこともない光景だ…」{n}知事の体が震える{/n}「他に何か？彼らの肢にある刃は、確かに鋭い」
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich grins, baring his sharp teeth.{/n} "Nothing good. We thought no one could hide better than our scouts, but these tin cans came out of nowhere. Tough bastards they are! You'd sooner kill ten Drovers than one of those beasts! They even drape themselves in our flesh. I've seen a lot, but that was something else..." {n}The governor shudders.{/n} "What else? Those blades on their limbs are not bad at cutting, I'll give them that..."
